walkthrough.title: Choose Factions and Gather Components
walkthrough.text: First, decide who will play the Galactic Empire and who will play the Rebel Alliance. If you cannot agree, flip a coin. Each player takes their faction's plastic miniatures, leaders, loyalty markers, faction sheet, mission cards, and action cards. Place these components in front of the respective player. The Imperial player gets all the gray miniatures including TIE Fighters, Star Destroyers, Stormtroopers, AT-STs, AT-ATs, and the Death Star. The Rebel player gets all the tan miniatures including X-wings, Y-wings, Corellian Corvettes, Rebel Transports, Mon Calamari Cruisers, Rebel Troopers, Airspeeders, Shield Generators, and Ion Cannons.

walkthrough.title: Place Starting Leaders
walkthrough.text: Each player takes their four starting leaders, which are the leaders that do not have a recruit icon on the back of their stand. Place these leaders in the Leader Pool space on your faction sheet. The Imperial player starts with Emperor Palpatine, Darth Vader, General Tagge, and Colonel Yularen. The Rebel player starts with Princess Leia, Mon Mothma, General Rieekan, and Jan Dodonna. All leaders with recruit icons are set aside near the game board. They cannot enter the game until recruited later.

walkthrough.title: Prepare the Game Board and Time Track
walkthrough.text: Take both halves of the game board and place them together in the center of the play area. This is a large board showing the entire Star Wars galaxy with 32 systems organized into 8 regions. Place the time marker on the first space of the time track at the top of the board. Place the reputation marker on space 14 of the time track. These two markers will move toward each other during the game. If they ever meet, the Rebel player wins immediately.

walkthrough.title: Prepare the Objective Deck
walkthrough.text: Sort the objective cards into three piles according to the Roman numeral on each card back: Stage I, Stage II, and Stage III. Shuffle each pile individually. Then stack them with Stage III on the bottom, Stage II in the middle, and Stage I on top. Place this deck on the Objectives space of the game board. The Rebel player draws one objective card from the top of the deck. These objectives are how the Rebel player gains reputation to win the game.

walkthrough.title: Prepare the Action Decks
walkthrough.text: Each player takes all of their action cards that have a recruit icon on the back and shuffles them to create their action deck. Place this deck facedown next to your faction sheet on the side labeled Action Deck. These cards are drawn during recruiting and provide powerful one-time abilities tied to specific leaders. Do not mix in the starting action cards yet. Those are handled separately in a later step.

walkthrough.title: Prepare Tactic Decks, Markers, and Dice
walkthrough.text: Shuffle the space tactic cards and ground tactic cards into two separate decks. Place them within easy reach of both players. These cards are drawn during combat based on your leaders' tactic values. Gather all remaining markers including loyalty markers, subjugation markers, sabotage markers, damage markers, and attachment rings. Place them nearby along with all the dice. There are black dice and red dice used for combat and missions.

walkthrough.title: Prepare Mission Cards
walkthrough.text: Each player sorts their mission cards. First, set aside the four starting missions, identified by a yellow arrow at the bottom of the card. These go directly into your hand. The Imperial player also separates out the project cards, which have a white star in a blue circle on the bottom-right corner. Shuffle the project cards and place them facedown on the Projects space of the game board. Each player shuffles their remaining mission cards to create their mission deck, placed facedown on the side of their faction sheet labeled Mission Deck.

walkthrough.title: Determine Starting Loyalty
walkthrough.text: Shuffle the probe deck and reveal cards from the top until three Rebel systems and five Imperial systems have been drawn. Place a Rebel loyalty marker in each of the three Rebel systems. For the Imperial systems, place a subjugation marker in the first two Imperial systems drawn, and an Imperial loyalty marker in the remaining three. Return the five probe cards showing Imperial starting systems to the game box. Shuffle all other revealed probe cards back into the probe deck.

walkthrough.title: Place Imperial Starting Units
walkthrough.text: The Imperial player receives 3 Star Destroyers, 3 Assault Carriers, 12 TIE Fighters, 12 Stormtroopers, 5 AT-STs, 1 AT-AT, and 1 Death Star. Place these units in any systems that have an Imperial loyalty marker or subjugation marker. At least one ground unit must be placed in each Imperial system. Spread your forces strategically across your loyal and subjugated systems.

walkthrough.title: Place Rebel Starting Units
walkthrough.text: The Rebel player receives 1 Corellian Corvette, 1 Rebel Transport, 2 X-wings, 2 Y-wings, 6 Rebel Troopers, and 2 Airspeeders. These units can be placed on the Rebel Base space on the game board and/or any one Rebel or neutral system. You do not have to split them. Many Rebel players place most or all units on the Rebel Base space to keep them hidden and mobile.

walkthrough.title: Draw Starting Action Cards
walkthrough.text: Each player draws two random starting action cards. These are the action cards without a recruit icon on them. Place them facedown near your faction sheet. You can look at your own cards at any time, but keep them hidden from your opponent. Return all other starting action cards to the game box without revealing them. These cards provide powerful one-time abilities that can be used at specific moments during the game.

walkthrough.title: Choose Rebel Base Location
walkthrough.text: This is the most important decision of setup. The Rebel player secretly chooses one card from the probe deck and places it facedown under the Rebel Base Location space on the game board. This is where the Rebel base is hiding. Do not reveal this to the Imperial player. Then shuffle the probe deck and place it on the Probe Deck space. The entire game hinges on the Empire finding this base and the Rebels keeping it hidden.

walkthrough.title: Draw Starting Mission Hand
walkthrough.text: Each player takes their four starting missions that were set aside earlier. Then draw the top two cards from your mission deck. This gives you a starting hand of six mission cards. Keep this hand hidden from your opponent. Starting missions are identified by the yellow arrow and can never be discarded. They return to your hand after being used. You are now ready to begin playing. The Rebel player takes the first turn during the Assignment Phase.

summary.title: Choose Factions and Gather Components
bullets: Decide who plays the Empire and who plays the Rebels
Each player takes their faction's miniatures, leaders, loyalty markers, faction sheet, mission cards, and action cards
Imperial: gray miniatures (TIE Fighters, Star Destroyers, Stormtroopers, AT-STs, AT-ATs, Death Star)
Rebel: tan miniatures (X-wings, Y-wings, Corvettes, Transports, Mon Cal Cruisers, Troopers, Airspeeders, Shield Generators, Ion Cannons)

summary.title: Place Starting Leaders
bullets: Each player places 4 starting leaders (no recruit icon) into their Leader Pool
Imperial: Palpatine, Vader, Tagge, Yularen
Rebel: Leia, Mon Mothma, Rieekan, Dodonna
Recruitable leaders (with recruit icons) are set aside near the board

summary.title: Prepare the Game Board and Time Track
bullets: Place both board halves together in the center
Place time marker on space 1 of the time track
Place reputation marker on space 14 of the time track
If the two markers meet, the Rebels win immediately

summary.title: Prepare the Objective Deck
bullets: Sort objective cards into Stage I, II, III piles; shuffle each separately
Stack: Stage III on bottom, II in middle, I on top
Place on Objectives space; Rebel player draws 1 card
Objectives are how Rebels gain reputation to win

summary.title: Prepare the Action Decks
bullets: Each player shuffles action cards with recruit icons into a facedown deck
Place next to faction sheet on the Action Deck side
These cards are drawn when recruiting new leaders
Starting action cards are handled separately

summary.title: Prepare Tactic Decks, Markers, and Dice
bullets: Shuffle space tactic and ground tactic cards into 2 separate decks
Gather loyalty, subjugation, sabotage, and damage markers
Place attachment rings, black dice, and red dice nearby

summary.title: Prepare Mission Cards
bullets: Set aside 4 starting missions per player (yellow arrow icon)
Imperial separates project cards (white star/blue circle) into their own deck on the Projects space
Remaining mission cards shuffled into each player's mission deck

summary.title: Determine Starting Loyalty
bullets: Reveal probe cards until 3 Rebel systems and 5 Imperial systems are drawn
Place Rebel loyalty in the 3 Rebel systems
Place subjugation markers in the first 2 Imperial systems, loyalty markers in the other 3
Return 5 Imperial probe cards to box; shuffle rest back into probe deck
